List and identify types of dirty data in datasets, including missing, outlier, and duplicate data  
Explain methods to discard dirty data, such as discarding instances, features, and pairwise discarding, and when each method is appropriate  
Describe techniques for imputing missing and outlier data, including mean, hot-deck, cold-deck, and regression imputation  
Apply pandas methods to detect, discard, and impute dirty data in Python dataframes effectively  
Understand the impact of dirty data on data analysis and the importance of cleaning data for accurate results
